title: OneLayer
description: Superflat world with all biomes and structures
body:
**Description**
This mod generates a flat world that includes all the biomes and structures of a regular world.

It allows you to recreate a superflat world while still being able to experience a full adventure within it.


🛠 **Configuration**

A configuration file named **onelayer-common.toml** can be found in the **config** folder or directly in-game, it allows you to adjust world generation and certain behaviors to better fit your adventure, server, or modpack.


🌳 **Server** :

You can test it by adding the following parameter to your server.properties file: 


```
level-type=onelayer\:onelayer
```

It’s recommended to add this parameter before creating your world.


🌴 **Client** : 

Select **One Layer** on generation type

 
⚒ **Informations**

📜 If you're interested in using it or feel some features are missing, feel free to contact me or create an issue, I'm open to feedback and suggestions ! Join my Discord or contact me directely via Modrinth.
